title: LinkedIn Daily Post — Tuesday
body:
NJ homebuyers: The biggest myth I hear every week is that you need a W2 job to get approved. Self-employed, 1099, investor, or new to the US — there are loan programs built for you. I've been helping the NJ community navigate this for years. Questions? My calendar is open: calendly.com/abualiwael

NMLS #2171794 | Licensed in NJ | Equal Housing Lender
